name: Delicious Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chocolate into small pieces and cook with the brown and granulated sugar, condensed milk, and corn syrup.
2. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the mixture forms a soft ball when dropped in cold water.
4. Remove from heat, add butter, and let cool.
5. Beat until it begins to lose its glossy appearance.
6. Add vanilla and nuts; pour into a greased pan and allow to cool.
7. Cut into squares.
